---
title: "The Rev. Edward Fursdon"
---

## The Rev. Edward Fursdon

**Dates:** (1810-1889)

### Description

Vicar of Dawlish

### Biography

He married (27 Feb 1838) his first cousin Harriet Grace Rodd [LG 1952 Fursdon of Fursdon, Rodd of Trebartha]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
